message:
feat(io): add complex number dtype support for NumPy-compatible binary I/O

Implement full complex number read/write support in the NPY I/O layer,
matching NumPy's interleaved memory layout for complex64 and complex128
dtypes in both little-endian and big-endian byte orders.

- Add Complex64, Complex64Be, Complex128, Complex128Be variants to
  IOSupportedDType with correct descriptor strings (<c8, >c8, <c16, >c16),
  item sizes (8 and 16 bytes), and is_complex() predicate
- Implement fromfile_complex/tofile_complex for raw binary complex I/O
  with decode_complex_element/encode_complex_element helpers
- Implement save_complex/load_complex for high-level NPY format complex
  array serialization matching numpy.save/numpy.load semantics
- Guard scalar fromfile/tofile against complex dtypes with explicit error
- Add tests: roundtrip for complex128 and complex64-BE, scalar rejection
  of complex dtypes, save/load complex roundtrip, non-complex load rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
